answer_en:
Multifidus m.
Origin: Superior articular processes of C4-C7, transverse processes of thoracic vertebrae, mammillary processes of lumbar vertebrae, posterior superior iliac spine, and posterior surface of ilium
Insertion: Spinous processes of vertebrae 2-4 levels above origin
